components.title: CyberForge Kubernetes Platform
components.description: Kubernetes-based secure platform with STIG hardening and policy enforcement.
components.purpose: Provides the compute and orchestration layer for CyberForge workloads.

control-implementations.description: NIST SP 800-53 Rev 5 control implementations for the Kubernetes platform.

implemented-requirements.description: Account management is implemented via Kubernetes RBAC backed by OIDC/AD.

statements.description: Account types are defined in rbac.yaml; service accounts follow least-privilege.

implemented-requirements.description: Audit logging is provided by the ELK stack. All API server events are forwarded.

statements.description: Kubernetes API audit policy logs all create, update, delete, and sensitive get events.

implemented-requirements.description: STIG-compliant configurations enforced via Kyverno policies and OS hardening playbook.

statements.description: Container STIG policies in baselines/container-stig/ enforce runtime configuration.

implemented-requirements.description: All images must be signed with Cosign and sourced from IronBank or approved mirrors.

statements.description: Kyverno ClusterPolicy 'require-signed-images' enforces this at admission.

components.title: HashiCorp Vault
components.description: Secrets management service providing dynamic credentials and key management.
components.purpose: Centralizes secrets management and PKI for CyberForge workloads.

control-implementations.description: NIST SP 800-53 Rev 5 implementations for HashiCorp Vault.

implemented-requirements.description: Vault provides dynamic secret generation, certificate issuance, and credential rotation.

statements.description: Vault enforces secret TTLs, automatic rotation, and audit logging of all access.
